mapper.sql: id, code, order_no, user_id, user_name, total_amount, status, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, update_time, pay_time, ship_time, finish_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order (code, order_no, user_id, user_name, total_amount, status, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, update_time, pay_time, ship_time, finish_time, deleted) VALUES (#{code}, #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{addressId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{payTime}, #{shipTime}, #{finishTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM t_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order (code, order_no, user_id, user_name, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{order.code}, #{order.orderNo}, #{order.userId}, #{order.userName}, #{order.totalAmount}, #{order.status}, #{order.receiverName}, #{order.receiverPhone}, #{order.receiverAddress}, #{order.createTime}, #{order.updateTime}, #{order.deleted})
